description_long: This is a modern, slim laptop with a metallic silver finish and a minimalist design. The device features a large, high-resolution display with thin bezels, and the screen is currently open, displaying a blue abstract wallpaper. The keyboard is backlit and uses a QWERTY layout, with a touch bar above the function row, and a spacious trackpad below. The chassis is constructed primarily from aluminum, giving it a sleek and sturdy appearance, while the hinge mechanism is nearly invisible from most angles. The back of the lid displays a prominent, polished apple-shaped logo, indicating a recognizable brand. No external ports or stickers are visible on the sides or palm rest in these views.
description: A sleek, silver metallic laptop with a large display, thin bezels, and a backlit QWERTY keyboard. The lid features a polished apple-shaped logo and the screen shows a blue abstract wallpaper.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the open screen with a blue abstract wallpaper, full keyboard, touch bar, and large trackpad.
description_view_1: Front-right view highlighting the thin bezels of the display and the edge of the keyboard and palm rest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth metallic lid with a polished apple-shaped logo, no ports or stickers visible.
description_view_3: Rear-left view showing the closed-back lid, part of the keyboard, and the apple-shaped logo.
attribute_brand_logo: A polished apple-shaped logo is visible on the center of the back lid, with a reflective finish and no text.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned on, displaying a blue abstract wallpaper.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row replaced by a touch bar, no numeric keypad, and a large trackpad below.
